_meta.description: Pre-captured Craigslist scrape results for demo replay. Used when DEMO_MODE=true so the demo doesn't depend on Craigslist availability.

tasks.title: Help moving studio apartment - 4 hours
tasks.description: Moving from a 4th-floor walkup studio in Williamsburg to a ground-floor unit in Bushwick. Need 1-2 strong helpers. Truck already rented. ~25 boxes plus a queen mattress, dresser, sofa.

tasks.title: Drywall patch and paint - 3 holes
tasks.description: Three small drywall holes in living room from removed shelving. Need patching, sanding, and color-matched paint touch-up. Paint and supplies will be provided.

tasks.title: IKEA PAX wardrobe assembly
tasks.description: Need help assembling a PAX wardrobe system - 3 frames, 2 sets of doors, internal organizers. All parts on-site. Estimated 3-4 hours for an experienced assembler.

tasks.title: Yard cleanup and bagged removal
tasks.description: Front and back yard need cleanup - rake leaves, trim back overgrown bushes, bag everything for removal. Tools provided. Estimated 4-5 hours.

tasks.title: Catering helper for private event - Saturday
tasks.description: Looking for one extra hand for a 40-person dinner party Saturday evening. Tasks: plating, refilling drinks, light cleanup. 5-hour shift. Black shirt required.

tasks.title: Mount 3 floating shelves in nursery
tasks.description: Need 3 floating shelves mounted, properly anchored into studs (drywall over wood). Shelves are pre-bought. Stud finder helpful but not required.

tasks.title: Replace bathroom faucet and shutoff valves
tasks.description: Old bathroom faucet is leaking from base. Need full replacement plus the two angle stop valves under the sink. New faucet purchased. Should take 1-2 hours.

tasks.title: Move large desk - 2nd floor walk-up
tasks.description: Need 2 people to help move a large L-shaped desk from a moving truck up to a 2nd floor walk-up apartment. ~20 minutes of actual work. Tip + cash on completion.

tasks.title: Bartender for engagement party - Sunday afternoon
tasks.description: Hosting a 50-person engagement party Sunday 2-7pm. Need an experienced bartender with their own kit. Beer/wine plus a signature cocktail menu (3 drinks).

tasks.title: Touch-up painting in hallway and stairwell
tasks.description: Need touch-up paint work in a long hallway and the connecting stairwell - scuffs and a few small holes. Paint matched and on-site. ~3 hours of careful work.

tasks.title: Deep clean before move-out
tasks.description: Studio apartment needs deep cleaning before move-out inspection - oven, fridge, baseboards, inside cabinets, bathroom tile. Supplies will be provided.

tasks.title: Build IKEA bunk bed - kids room
tasks.description: Need help assembling a KURA reversible bunk bed plus a small matching dresser. About 3 hours total for one experienced assembler.

tasks.title: Light fixture swap - 2 ceiling fans
tasks.description: Replace 2 existing ceiling light fixtures with new Hunter ceiling fans. Wiring already in place. Estimated 1 hour per fixture.

tasks.title: Help loading moving truck - 2 hours Saturday morning
tasks.description: Loading a 16-ft U-Haul Saturday 9am - mostly boxes plus a few pieces of furniture (sofa, mattress, table). Truck parked right out front.

tasks.title: Furniture assembly - West Elm dining set
tasks.description: Just received a West Elm dining table + 6 chairs. Need everything assembled and packaging cleared out. ~3 hours of work.
